abilities.name: Demise
abilities.description: Falls unconscious = killed. On death, all within p2 suffer 2 damage + Ice effect.

abilities.name: Melee Expert
abilities.description: Generates 1 additional AP only for Close Combat.

abilities.name: Frozen Heart
abilities.description: Immune to Horror Duels and Paralyzed Condition.

actions: (1) Talon (Pugilism) | AV: 8R (16R) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 3/4/6 damage. Ram Toss: Reduce to 0, push 10 yards, Prone.
(3) Smash (Pugilism) | AV: 8R (16R) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 9/10/12 damage.
system.notes: Massive elemental Ice construct. Immune Horror/Paralyzed. Powerful freezing aura. On death inflicts Slow.
